name: Direction-Preserving Context Engine
description: Context Direction Alignment (CDA) for ultra-long continuous tasks. Keeps direction stable under extreme compression and never repeats a known dead end.
author: Wilson/Blitz

assemble.description: Build turn input with phase-aware direction filtering and dead-end suppression

ingest.description: Chunk and store new messages with semantic direction tags

afterTurn.description: Evaluate context quality, alignment score, and detect dead ends post-turn

compact.description: Compress context using SCG topology preservation

bootstrap.description: Cold-start with hot-experience pre-warming and dead-end registry load

registerDeadEnd.description: Explicitly mark a reasoning trace or tool-call pattern as a known dead end.

listDeadEnds.description: Retrieve known dead ends for a session, useful for debugging or UI dashboards.

getDirectionState.description: Inspect current semantic direction, drift score, and dead-end matches.

install.post_install: echo 'Direction-Preserving Context Engine installed. Add the assemble hook to your agent config to activate.'
